title: THE WORKTREE PARALLEL
description: Work on multiple branches simultaneously without switching. Advanced multitasking.
story_intro:
Three cases demanded my attention simultaneously. Switching branches constantly was killing my productivity.

Then I discovered worktrees - multiple working directories, each on a different branch, all from one repository.

Time to work in parallel dimensions.

steps.instruction: Create a new worktree for the 'urgent-case' branch in '../urgent' folder.
steps.narrative: Create a parallel workspace for the urgent investigation.

git worktree add ../urgent urgent-case: HEAD is now at 3a1f9b2 latest evidence update
git worktree add ../urgent/ urgent-case: HEAD is now at 3a1f9b2 latest evidence update
git worktree add \"../urgent\" urgent-ca: HEAD is now at 3a1f9b2 latest evidence update
git worktree add '../urgent' urgent-case: HEAD is now at 3a1f9b2 latest evidence update
git worktree add ../urgent \"urgent-case: HEAD is now at 3a1f9b2 latest evidence update
git worktree add ../urgent 'urgent-case': HEAD is now at 3a1f9b2 latest evidence update

steps.hint: Add a new worktree for a branch

steps.instruction: List all worktrees associated with this repository.
steps.narrative: Verify the parallel workspace is active. See all dimensions at once.

steps.instruction: Create a new worktree with a new branch 'cold-case' in '../cold' folder.
steps.narrative: A third case just came in. Start a fresh investigation in its own space.

git worktree add -b cold-case ../cold: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add ../cold -b cold-case: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add -b cold-case ../cold/: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add ../cold/ -b cold-case: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add -b \"cold-case\" ../col: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add -b 'cold-case' ../cold: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add -b cold-case \"../cold\: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add -b cold-case '../cold': HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add \"../cold\" -b cold-cas: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update
git worktree add '../cold' -b cold-case: HEAD is now at a7c9d12 latest evidence update

steps.instruction: Remove the worktree at '../urgent' after the case is closed.
steps.narrative: The urgent case is solved. Time to close that parallel workspace.
Some old worktrees were deleted manually but their records remain. Clean up the dead references.

git worktree prune --verbose: Removing worktrees/stale-investigation: gitdir file points to non-existing location
git worktree prune -v: Removing worktrees/stale-investigation: gitdir file points to non-existing location
